---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve Daynight Music.
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## Bug Report

**A clear and concise description of what the bug is.**

### Device Information
- **Device**: [e.g., Pixel 7 Pro]
- **Android Version**: [e.g., Android 14]
- **App Version**: [e.g., 0.4]
- **Installation Source**: [e.g., GitHub Release, Manual Build]

### Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

### Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

### Actual Behavior
What actually happens. (Include error messages or behavior descriptions)

### Screenshots/Recordings
If applicable, add screenshots or screen recordings to help explain your problem.

### Logcat (Optional but highly recommended)
If you can, please provide a logcat output when the issue occurs.
